title: IQAir AirVisual API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary and terminology used by the IQAir AirVisual air quality API.

terms.label: Air Quality Index
terms.definition: A standardized index that communicates how clean or polluted the air is and what associated health effects might be a concern. Higher values indicate worse air quality.

terms.label: AQI US
terms.definition: Air Quality Index value calculated using the US EPA standard. Scale: 0-50 Good, 51-100 Moderate, 101-150 Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups, 151-200 Unhealthy, 201-300 Very Unhealthy, 301-500 Hazardous.

terms.label: AQI China
terms.definition: Air Quality Index value calculated using the China Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEP) standard.

terms.label: Main US Pollutant
terms.definition: The primary pollutant driving the US AQI value at a given time.

terms.label: PM2.5
terms.definition: Fine inhalable particles with diameters 2.5 micrometers and smaller. A primary air quality concern due to ability to penetrate deep into the lungs.

terms.label: PM10
terms.definition: Inhalable particles with diameters 10 micrometers and smaller, including dust, pollen, and mold.

terms.label: Ozone
terms.definition: Ground-level ozone (O3), a secondary pollutant formed by chemical reactions between NOx and VOCs in the presence of sunlight.

terms.label: Nitrogen Dioxide
terms.definition: NO2 is a gaseous air pollutant produced by combustion of fuels. Contributes to the formation of smog and acid rain.

terms.label: Sulfur Dioxide
terms.definition: SO2 is produced by burning fossil fuels and smelting mineral ores that contain sulfur. Can cause respiratory problems.

terms.label: Carbon Monoxide
terms.definition: CO is a colorless, odorless gas produced by incomplete combustion of carbon-containing fuels.

terms.label: Concentration
terms.definition: The measured concentration of a pollutant in the air at a given time and location.

terms.label: Atmospheric Pressure
terms.definition: Atmospheric pressure at the measurement location.

terms.label: Humidity
terms.definition: Relative humidity expressed as a percentage.

terms.label: Wind Speed
terms.definition: Current wind speed at the measurement location.

terms.label: Wind Direction
terms.definition: Wind direction expressed as an angle in degrees. North=0°, East=90°, South=180°, West=270°.

terms.label: Weather Icon
terms.definition: Weather icon code representing the current sky condition (e.g., 01d = clear sky day, 02d = few clouds day, 09d = shower rain, 10d = rain, 11d = thunderstorm, 13d = snow, 50d = mist).

terms.label: Timestamp
terms.definition: ISO 8601 date-time string indicating when the measurement was recorded.

terms.label: Minimum Temperature
terms.definition: Minimum forecasted temperature for a forecast period.
